$comment: Register semantics for the PumpSaver Plus 233-P IR broadcast. confidence: verified = cross-checked against external ground truth; candidate = consistent hypothesis, unconfirmed; unknown = observed value only. Values in 'observed' are from a 233-P on a ~240V well pump, Nov-Dec 2025.

protocol.word: 0x90 | reg:8 | value:16 BE, MSB-first, trailing zero-bits omitted
protocol.ring_block: 0x19-0x75, round-robined in 4 chunks, full refresh every ~5.8 s

registers.name: pump_starts
registers.notes: Lifetime pump-start counter (user-clearable). +1 within ~2 s of every ground-truth pump start (8/8 matched).

registers.name: power
registers.notes: Active power. ~26 W idle (device self-draw), ~820 W reported while running (see factor-2 note in PROTOCOL.md), inrush peaks ~1700.

registers.name: voltage
registers.notes: Live line voltage x10. Tracks sags from any load on the leg, not just the pump.

registers.name: current
registers.notes: Live current x100. ~0.14 A idle, ~8.7 A reported while running (may double-count both hot legs; see PROTOCOL.md).

registers.name: power_factor
registers.notes: ~0.78 idle and running. P = V*I*PF holds exactly at idle; reads x0.5 while running (open question).

registers.name: run_minutes
registers.notes: Cumulative run-time in minutes (user-clearable). Ticks +1 per 60 s of pump running; tick carry-chains were the arithmetic proof of the encoding.

registers.name: calibration_voltage
registers.notes: Observed constant 2384 (238.4 V). Calibration/nominal voltage candidate.

registers.name: overload_trip
registers.notes: Observed constant 1223 (12.23 A?), equal to 0x08. Overload trip = 125% of cal current per manual.

registers.name: low_voltage_trip
registers.notes: Observed constant 2112 (211.2 V). Low-voltage trip or min-volts-since-cal.

registers.name: runtime_snapshot
registers.notes: Observed constant 45060 = exactly 751 h x 60. Possibly runtime at last service/reset.

registers.name: const_0x09
registers.notes: Observed constant 50. Restart delay or trip delay candidate.

registers.name: high_voltage_trip
registers.notes: Observed constant 2488 (248.8 V). High-voltage trip or max-volts-since-cal.

blocks.notes: 20 packed 4-bit fault-code slots (last-20-faults feature). Observed: nineteen code-1, one code-4.
Observed constant 774. PF-like magnitude; sits between the fault-code slots and the snapshot triplets.
~19 per-fault snapshot triplets (voltage x10, current-like 5.41-6.60, PF-like 0.755-0.838). Below-normal current is consistent with dry-well/underload trips.
Byte table: 00 7F 3C 00 (1A 2F 00)x14 (1A 2E 00)x~5 7E 3C. Possibly per-fault run-clock timestamps.
